title: Regional improvement for standards and excellence (RISE)
body: "This document:   introduces RISE  explains how we have selected schools for targeted interventions sets out the universal service’s national priorities   It is for:   school leaders local authorities academy trusts governing bodies  RISE advisers educational stakeholders   The support available is listed on regional improvement for standards and excellence (RISE): school support.  We also publish a list of RISE advisers and of schools currently receiving targeted intervention.  "
